purpose: Unlike NTSB transfer micro for ntsb_investigation_v1, using a retained highway/hazmat investigation report rather than the UPS aviation preliminary micro. Pressures whether the closed NTSB skeleton transfers across mode, casualty table shape, hazmat conditions, chronology, and final probable-cause findings without prose-shaped atom slots.
claim_path_policy: compile-only; no QA question text; no source-record prose retrieval
